description: Upstream site registry — describes the source only (identity, endpoints, documented model list). Keys in .env via api_key_env. Test execution: assess-plan.json.

b.ai.notes: Chat Completions + Messages API; no /v1/responses (Codex blocked). Fill supported_models when vendor doc list is known.
